subject: [PATCH v2 16/28] nfsd: add data structures for handling CB_NOTIFY

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds data structures and functions to support directory delegation CB_NOTIFY in the NFS server. It introduces two new structs, nfsd_notify_event and nfsd4_cb_notify, which carry fsnotify events and per-delegation state for notification handling respectively. The patch also refactors alloc_init_deleg into a common function with a pluggable callback for freeing resources, and adds alloc_init_dir_deleg to allocate necessary buffers for CB_NOTIFY encoding. Additionally, it sets up skeleton operations for the notification path that will be filled in later.
